testcase.name: CN/DN Forms - Error Check › Debit Note Form - Check for vendors.map and products.filter errors
testcase.system-out:
✅ Logged in ❌ Console Error: [next-auth][error][CLIENT_FETCH_ERROR] https://next-auth.js.org/errors#client_fetch_error Failed to fetch {error: Object, url: /api/auth/csrf, message: Failed to fetch} ⚠️ Could not find or click button: locator.waitFor: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: [2m - waiting for locator('button:has-text("สร้างใบเพิ่มหนี้")') to be visible[22m

testcase.name: CN/DN Forms - Error Check › Credit Note Form - Check for customers.map and products.filter errors
